headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on The Hartford Insurance Gr, Lowers Price Target to $159
summary: Barclays  analyst Alex Scott   maintains The Hartford Insurance Gr (NYSE:HIG) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $162 to $159.
